case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC VS. DAVID GREEN et al

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tamara Rosseli, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic Inc.
Arnold Walter Evje representing the plaintiff.

Defendant David Green is present.
Alfredo Silva representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 34 Sixth Street #502, San Francisco, California.

This case settled, the trial date of 4/13/09 is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Don Sullivan, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218)
